  • Start Here

Start Using Handshake

Ready to dive into the Handshake ecosystem? Follow these steps to set up your decentralized tools and start exploring marketplaces on HNS.

1

Download Bob Wallet

The premier desktop wallet for managing your HNS coins and domain names securely.

Download Bob Wallet
2

Install Chrome Extension

Interact with Handshake domains directly from your browser with the Bob Wallet extension.

Get the Extension
3

Visit ShakeDex Marketplace

Buy and sell Handshake domains on our decentralized web marketplace.

Explore ShakeDex
4

Buy/Sell HNS

Easily trade Handshake coins (HNS) through the decentralized Liquidity Spot.

Visit Liquidity Spot
5

Join the Community

Participate in GitHub development, join discussions, and help build the future of the decentralized web.

GitHub Telegram
